case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. LILIA V. CASTILLO et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-09-2005 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT CASTILLO, LILIA V.

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO, LILIA V. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-09-2005 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-08-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-25-2005
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK SERVED JUN-13-2005, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO, LILIA V.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTILLO, LILIA V. $2,216.79 PRINCIPAL, $485.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $74.69 INTEREST, $385.60 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,162.08, (MONTHLY PAYMENTS OF $150.00 STARTING ON 6/30/05) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
